page_metadata.biotools__summary: CellPPD is an in silico method, which is developed to predict and design efficient cell penetrating peptides (CPPs). The main dataset used in this method consists of 708 experimentally validated CPPs.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CellPPD is an in silico method, which is developed to predict and design efficient cell penetrating peptides (CPPs). The main dataset used in this method consists of 708 experimentally validated CPPs.
